channel.title: Home on Victor Touroul
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Victor Touroul

item.title: Champognon
item.description:
Champognon is a game board prototype. It was made as a school project by a team of 4 people, including myself.

Carrousel general

It is a simple ressource managment turn based game where each player has to choose what to grow in order make combos of goods that can sell for astronomic amounts of money.

Image menu and crops

You can only grow goods during their respective season, and planning ahead is the key to sucess. If you feel that a player have the upper hand, sabotage can be an option to slow them down

item.title: Dragon de Glace
item.description: Le projet “Dragon de Glace” est l’application concrète des compétences de level design d’une équipe de 3 level designers et 2 level artists. L’ambition était de créer une expérience équilibrée

item.title: Haunted West
item.description:
Haunted West is a game made in 5 days during a school workshop. It is a top view 4 directional shooter where you must survive against hordes of angry ghosts.

Btn play

Gallery/carrousel assets

It was mase using processing, a javascript based ide mainly used to create procedurally generated art. It was mase using processing, a javascript based ide mainly used to create procedurally generated art.

It was mase using processing, a javascript based ide mainly used to create procedurally generated art.

item.title: Pierre Qui Roule
item.description:
Tempor proident minim aliquip reprehenderit dolor et ad anim Lorem duis sint eiusmod. Labore ut ea duis dolor. Incididunt consectetur proident qui occaecat incididunt do nisi Lorem. Tempor do laborum elit laboris excepteur eiusmod do. Eiusmod nisi excepteur ut amet pariatur adipisicing Lorem.
